description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a combination of brick and stone exterior walls, featuring a prominent dark gable roof. The front facade includes large windows, a double-door main entry, and a garage with a flat roof extension. The property is enclosed by a low fence and has landscaped green lawns on both sides, with paved walkways leading to the entrances. The rear of the house features additional windows and a secondary entry, as well as a small patio area. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional elements, with asymmetrical window placement and a mix of materials for visual interest.
description: A modern two-story house with brick and stone walls, a dark gable roof, large windows, and a garage, surrounded by a low fence and green lawns.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brick wall, sloped gable roof, and fenced yard with a garage visible on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entry, large windows, stone and brick facade, and two green lawns separated by a walkway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a plain brick wall, gable roof, and fenced yard, minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the garage with a flat roof, secondary entry, and a mix of brick and stone walls with additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door main entry with steps, no porch, and minimal overhang, flanked by large windows
